stemHtml: What is the operating principle of pneumatic de-icing boots fitted to the leading edges of an aircraft?

options.a: Pushing bleed air through the boots to break away the ice.
options.b: Pushing engine oil through the boots to break the ice away.
options.c: Pushing hot bleed air through the boots to melt the ice.
options.d: Pushing engine oil through the boots to melt the ice away.
